inputs.label: Asset Cost
inputs.businessContext: Fair value or cost of the asset being leased.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fair value or cost of the asset being leased.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiralanan varlığın gerçeğe uygun değeri veya maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Beizulegender Zeitwert oder Kosten des geleasten Vermögenswerts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Juste valeur ou coût de l'actif loué.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor razonable o costo del activo arrendado.

inputs.label: Lease Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the lease in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the lease in years.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Implicit interest rate in the lease, per annum.

businessContext_i18n.en: Implicit interest rate in the lease, per annum.
businessContext_i18n.de: Impliziter Zinssatz des Leasingvertrags pro Jahr.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt implicite du bail, par an.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés implícita en el arrendamiento, anual.

inputs.label: Residual Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated fair value of the asset at the end of the lease term.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated fair value of the asset at the end of the lease term.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kira süresi sonunda varlığın tahmini gerçeğe uygun değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Zeitwert des Vermögenswerts am Ende der Leasinglaufzeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Juste valeur estimée de l'actif à la fin du bail.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor razonable estimado del activo al final del plazo del arrendamiento.

inputs.label: Payments per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of lease payments per year (12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly, 1 for annual).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of lease payments per year (12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly, 1 for annual).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık kira ödeme sayısı (12 aylık, 4 üç aylık, 1 yıllık).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Leasingzahlungen pro Jahr (12 für monatlich, 4 für vierteljährlich, 1 für jährlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de paiements de loyer par an (12 pour mensuel, 4 pour trimestriel, 1 pour annuel).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de pagos de arrendamiento por año (12 para mensual, 4 para trimestral, 1 para anual).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
